'''pajozho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mcf|mcf]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-j-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mcf|mcf]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| pajozho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæjezheth|pæjezheth]] || [[word:pæjezhej|pæjezhej]] || [[word:pæjezhesh|pæjezhesh]] || [[word:pæjezhe|pæjezhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:pajojozhoth|pajojozhoth]] || [[word:pajojozhoj|pajojozhoj]] || [[word:pajojozhosh|pajojozhosh]] || [[word:pajojozho|pajojozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:pajozhoth|pajozhoth]] || [[word:pajozhoj|pajozhoj]] || [[word:pajozhosh|pajozhosh]] || [[word:pajozho|pajozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:pajofzhoth|pajofzhoth]] || [[word:pajofzhoj|pajofzhoj]] || [[word:pajofzhosh|pajofzhosh]] || [[word:pajofzhof|pajofzhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pajozhotho|pajozhotho]] || [[word:pajozhojo|pajozhojo]] || [[word:pajozhosho|pajozhosho]] || [[word:pajozhoko|pajozhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pajozhoth|pajozhoth]] || [[word:pajozhoj|pajozhoj]] || [[word:pajozhosh|pajozhosh]] || [[word:pajozho|pajozho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pajozhothol|pajozhothol]] || [[word:pajozhojol|pajozhojol]] || [[word:pajozhoshol|pajozhoshol]] || [[word:pajozhokol|pajozhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pajozhothotho|pajozhothotho]] || [[word:pajozhojojo|pajozhojojo]] || [[word:pajozhoshosho|pajozhoshosho]] || [[word:pajozhoko|pajozhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pajozhothon|pajozhothon]] || [[word:pajozhojon|pajozhojon]] || [[word:pajozhoshon|pajozhoshon]] || [[word:pajozhokon|pajozhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pajozhothoro|pajozhothoro]] || [[word:pajozhojoro|pajozhojoro]] || [[word:pajozhoshoro|pajozhoshoro]] || [[word:pajozhokoro|pajozhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
